ground_truth_source: NAS /Volumes/transit/Games/17 — 08 GA (U19) vs Columbia Premier SC (U19), 2026-03-07

baseline.notes: All runs #35-38b plateaued at F1 ~0.39 on the Rush game (08 GA U19 vs Washington Rush U19, 2026-02-07). Run #39 attempted this generalization test on 2026-03-14 U15 Westside Metros but that video had framing issues (camera didn't capture goal action → only 5 events detected in 120 min). Run #40 retries with 2026-03-07 08 GA U19 vs Columbia Premier — SAME team, age group (U19, 45-min halves), and rig as Rush; only the opponent and date change.

targets.notes: Apples-to-apples test on same-team-different-opponent. Expect detection volumes similar to Rush if pipeline generalizes. F1 close to ~0.39 confirms the ceiling is pipeline-general; substantially different would point to something Rush-specific. Per-type distributions are the primary signal.

notes: Run #40 — generalization test on same-team-different-opponent. Same feature commit as Run #38b (4eb6546 — ball chain linking + GK proximity + trajectory). Video: 2026-03-07 08 GA U19 vs Columbia Premier (117 min, 1944 GT events across both halves). U19 = 45-min halves (same as Rush). Offsets: VIDEO_OFFSET=420 (est), half2_start=4020 (est), half2_game_offset=2700 (U19 standard). Tolerance 90s. Replaces the aborted Run #39 on folder 18 (Westside Metros had framing issues — bad test video).
